response.justification: The candidate demonstrates exceptional software development skills and a broad technical background, but lacks direct experience in the core requirements of the role: C++ on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle, and fixed-income/capital-markets domain expertise. Their recent work at Google and Meta is impressive but unrelated to the financial sector or the specified technical stack.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and systems development experience with a focus on testability and modern practices (TDD, CI/CD).
Strong communication skills and leadership, evidenced by workshops, talks, and open-source contributions.
Diverse technical background with exposure to high-performance and low-latency systems (e.g., DLang at Sociomantic).
concerns: No demonstrated C++ experience on Windows in the last 5+ years; recent roles emphasize TypeScript, Node.js, and other languages.
Lacks direct experience with SQL Server or Oracle; MongoDB is the primary database mentioned.
No evident exposure to fixed-income, capital markets, or investment banking domains in professional roles.
